t_1: The ultimate local multiplayer tag arena. Apologize to your friends later.
t_7: Connect up to 8 players! No need for extra controllers—everyone uses their own device as both a controller and a viewport for their personal perspective.
t_9: Play anywhere, anytime. Chase Tag Arena requires
t_11: internet connection. Just hop on the same local Wi-Fi or hotspot and start the chase.
t_13: Connect a TV or large screen to the host device for an epic cinematic view. Let spectators cheer on the action while you dominate the arena!
t_15: Build your own arenas with the powerful built-in editor. Place obstacles, traps, and power-ups anywhere—even while offline.
t_17: Play seamlessly on Phone, Tablet, PC, or Mac. Every device works together in the same arena.
t_19: Download Chase Tag Arena from the Google Play Store on your favorite devices.
t_21: Make sure everyone is on the same Wi-Fi network. One player hosts a game, and others can join instantly.
t_23: Select from our default professional maps or dive into the community's custom creations.
t_25: Use simple controls to outmaneuver your friends. First one to tag everyone wins!

t_33: Chase Tag Arena - Official User Guide
t_34: Welcome to Chase Tag Arena! The ultimate, fast-paced local multiplayer game where you outmaneuver your friends in intense games of tag. Because our game has some unique mechanics compared to traditional games, we've created this guide to get you up and running quickly.
t_38: game. This means you don't connect to remote servers over the internet. Instead, you play directly with the friends who are in the same room (or on the same Wi-Fi network) as you. It's an "offline multiplayer" experience designed for zero-latency, high-energy fun.
t_42: be connected to the exact same Wi-Fi network or mobile hotspot to play together.
t_44: Getting started is easy. As long as
t_46: has downloaded the app, everyone else can join in!
t_47: For the Host (The person setting up the game):
t_48: Open the Chase Tag Arena App.
t_52: Your device is now acting as the game server! You will see a Lobby screen with a QR code and a connection URL (e.g.,
t_55: Ensure you are connected to the same Wi-Fi network as the Host.
t_56: If you have the app installed, open it and tap
t_58: . It should automatically find the host!
t_59: Don't have the app? No problem!
t_60: Open the camera on your iOS or Android device and scan the QR code on the Host's screen. This will open the game directly in your web browser. (Note: You can also play on a PC/Mac by typing the connection URL into your browser).
t_62: While playing through the web browser works great, downloading the native app from the App Store or Google Play provides a significantly smoother, faster, and more robust experience compared to the browser-based Web App (PWA).
t_64: Not enough players? Or just want more chaos? The Host can add AI bots to the game by pressing the
t_68: buttons in the lobby before starting the match.
t_70: Chase Tag Arena features a variety of exciting tag types:
t_72: One player starts as "It". Their goal is to tag another player to pass it on. The player who is "It" the least amount of time wins.
t_74: One player starts infected. Every player they tag also becomes infected. The last uninfected survivor wins!
t_76: Tagged evaders are frozen in place. Unfrozen evaders can touch frozen players to free them!
t_79: Use your device screen as a controller (joystick on the left, action buttons on the right) to move. Running slowly drains your energy. Sprinting drains it faster. You can't sprint without energy!
t_81: To tag someone, simply run into them while you are "It".
t_83: Keep an eye out for glowing items on the map! Collecting these can grant you an advantage:
t_85: Instantly replenishes your energy so you can keep sprinting.
t_87: Makes you mostly transparent to hide from opponents.
t_89: Gives you a temporary drastic boost in running speed.
t_91: Depending on the game mode, either avoid the "It" player at all costs or, if you are "It", hunt down the nearest player using the environment to cut them off.
t_93: Unleash your creativity with the built-in Arena Editor! You can access this from the main menu.
t_95: Set the size and then place walls, obstacles, portals and more, anywhere on the grid.
t_97: Save your custom arenas offline and host them for your friends to play on.
t_99: Inside the editor, you can adjust map bounds, lighting, and environmental effects to set the perfect mood for your chase.
t_100: For maximum control and speed of building, we highly suggest connecting with a PC/Mac and using a mouse and keyboard!
t_102: From the main menu, tap the Settings icon to access customizable options:
t_104: Adjust how fast your character turns and moves.
t_106: Lower this setting to improve frame rates on older devices.
t_108: Adjust background beats and sound effect volumes.
t_112: Welcome to Chase Tag Arena. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you as to how we look after your personal data when you use our game and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.
t_114: Chase Tag Arena is designed to be a local multiplayer game. We do not collect any personal identification information (PII) from you. We do not require account creation or registration.
t_115: We may collect non-personal data such as device information (model, OS version) and gameplay statistics to help us improve the game experience.
t_117: We may use third-party services like Google Play Services for achievements, leaderboards, or cloud saves. These services may collect information used to identify you. Please refer to their respective privacy policies.
t_119: Our game is intended for a general audience. Since the game does not have any functionality to input, transmit, or store personal data, it is impossible for any user, including children, to provide us with personal information. We do not knowingly collect, nor are we technically able to receive, any personal data from children.
t_121: Chase Tag Arena is designed to work entirely offline. An internet connection is not required to play the game, host a local lobby, or use the level editor. Any data used for local multiplayer remains on your local network.
t_123: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us via our developer page or community channels.
t_125: By downloading or using Chase Tag Arena, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the game.
t_127: We grant you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable, limited license to use the game for your personal, non-commercial entertainment purposes only.
t_129: You may not: reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the game; use the game for any illegal purpose; or attempt to gain unauthorized access to any game systems.
t_131: If you use the Level Editor, you are responsible for the content you create. You agree not to create or share content that is offensive, infringing, or illegal.
t_133: The game is provided "as is" and "as available" without any warranties of any kind, whether express or implied.
t_135: In no event shall Alex J be liable for any damages arising out of the use or inability to use the game.
